name: ghost-font-decoder
description: Run a decoder for ghost-font videos, show the revealed output image, and state the motion-hidden text in chat.

interface.shortDescription: Decode the text and show its reveal image
interface.longDescription: Run the Python decoder on text that is invisible in paused frames but appears through counter-moving dots or noise. The plugin uses dense optical flow, drift compensation, image cleanup, and optional OCR, then renders the revealed image and states the exact recovered text in chat.
defaultPrompt: Run the decoder, show the revealed image, and state the exact text in this video.
Decode this noisy video and display both the output image and recovered text.
